name: form
title: BTForm
description: Top-level form coordinator. Wraps a native <form> with a single `validation` prop (function form or per-field map) and a React context that BT inputs subscribe to via their `name` prop — value, onChange, onBlur, and error wire automatically. Errors gate on touched OR submitted; `onSubmit` only fires when the form is valid; `onInvalid` fires with the full error map otherwise. Children can be JSX nodes or a render-prop `(form) => ReactNode` that receives the full `BTFormState`.
